args_redacted.query: recent AI safety research papers 2024 2025 important findings

args_redacted.content:
AI Safety Research Summary - Recent Key Findings
================================================

1. Constitutional AI (Anthropic)
   Self-critique methods have been shown to reduce harmful outputs by 40%.
   This approach trains AI systems to evaluate and revise their own responses
   based on a set of constitutional principles, significantly improving safety.

2. Mechanistic Interpretability (MIT)
   Researchers have made progress in understanding transformer circuits,
   which now enables targeted editing of neural networks. This breakthrough
   allows for more precise interventions to remove unwanted behaviors without
   retraining entire models.

3. Scalable Oversight (DeepMind)
   New debate protocols have been developed that allow humans to effectively
   supervise superhuman AI systems. These protocols use structured debates
   between AI agents to surface information that humans can verify, enabling
   oversight even when AI capabilities exceed human expertise.
